Software Engineer ( Mobile )
We are looking for passionate candidates to join the Sri Lankan operations of an Australian-based
cutting-edge Technology Company serving both government and private organizations in Australia,
England, and New Zealand.
This can be a full-time position with the possibility to join the permanent carder based on your performance.
We offer attractive packages and flexibility of working from home (maintaining social distancing to stay
safe and healthy, as well as saving commuting time and cost).
Who are we looking for?
Self-motivated, energetic, and creative individuals who can work with minimal supervision and deliver high-quality
mobile solutions. We are looking for someone who has strong coding skills, a passion for mobile technologies,
and the ability to work effectively within cross-functional teams.
Skill Requirements:

© A Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT, or equivalent qualification

‘3 years of Strong hands-on coding experience with Flutter, Android native (Kotlin/Java), or iOS native

(Swift/Objective-C)

Experience with mobile UI/UX implementation and pixel-perfect design alignment

‘© Understanding of mobile architectures, state management, and performance optimization

‘© Experience integrating Firebase, push notifications, analytics, and mobile SDKs

‘© Experience integrating Google Pay / Apple Pay or similar mobile payment services

Familiarity with REST APIs, JSON, and backend integration

‘© Version control experience using Git

‘Experience with mobile app testing, debugging, and profiling tools

* Knowledge of Agile/Scrum development processes

‘© Experience with Play Store / App Store deployment will be an added advantage
Responsibilities

© Develop and maintain high-quality mobile applications using Flutter, Android, or iOS native

technologies

© Translate Figma designs into functional, responsive, and accurate mobile Ul

Perform developer testing and work collaboratively with QA to ensure defect-free releases

‘© Debug and troubleshoot mobile-specific issues across devices and OS versions

Provide accurate effort estimates and deliver tasks within sprint deadlines

‘* Collaborate closely with designers, backend developers, and product managers

'* Participate in code reviews and maintain code quality, documentation, and best practices

‘* Implement mobile-specific integrations such as payment gateways, Firebase, and third-party SDKs

© Support app submission processes and ensure compliance with App Store / Play Store guidelines
Ifyou have worked with the above skill requirements / areas more than 3 years, not scared to think out of the box and believe you can.
make an impact in changing the traditional way of work, then you are encouraged to apply. Feel Free to email your resume to

Software Engineer

© About the Role
We are seeking a talented Full-Stack Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate
will have strong expertise in React for frontend development and Spring Boot for
building robust REST APIs and backend services.

> Backend Development
® Proficiency in Java and Spring Boot framework
@ Strong experience building RESTful APIs
@ Knowledge of Spring Security, Spring Data JPA
* Experience with relational databases (MySQL)
®@ Understanding of microservices architecture
* API documentation (Swagger/OpenaPl)
> General Requirements
*@ 2-5 years of professional development experience
* Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
Experience with Git version control
* Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies
*® Good communication and teamwork skills
© Nice to Have
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
@ Knowledge of Docker and containerization
* CI/CD pipeline experience (Jenkins, GitLab Cl, GitHub Actions)
* Experience with NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Redis)
® TypeScript knowledge
* Testing frameworks (JUnit, Jest, React Testing Library)
*® Message queuing systems (RabbitMQ, Kafka)
© Responsibilities
® Design and develop responsive web applications using React

®@ Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and ship new features

®@ Participate in code reviews and mentor junior developers
® =Troubleshoot and debug applications
® Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability
® Stay up-to-date with emerging technologies and industry trends
© what We Offer
* Competitive salary package
@ Flexible working hours
* —Remote/Hybrid work options
*@ Professional development opportunities
® Collaborative and innovative work environment
Health insurance and benefits
® Modern tech stack and tools

Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 48
th
year of operations. DMS represents the world’s leading IT brands and specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets.
DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, financial solutions and learning from the most experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry.
DMS represents Diebold Nixdorf Inc. USA, the world leader in CRMs (Cash Recycling Machines) and ATMs (Automated Teller Machines) and while having implemented the following pioneering Projects, DMS is the market leader supporting an installed base of over 2000 CRMs and ATMs in Sri Lanka and the Maldives.
Introduced ATMs to the Maldives in 1999
First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives
First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific.
First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific.
First Envelope-less Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific.
First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins.
Career advancement is based on performance and merit. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Kuliyapitiya to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Kuliyapitiya should apply.
Engineering Service Executives for Kuliyapitiya (Male)
Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training.
Candidates should: -
Be under 27 years of age.
Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution.
Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software.
Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Kuliyapitiya area. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply.
Candidates should reside in the Kuliyapitiya Town or in close proximity to the Kuliyapitiya Town and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license.
Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond.
GENERAL
• The above position includes a negotiable salary.
Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to
careers@dmslanka2.com
. Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail.

DMS represents the World's leading American IT Co's IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust-Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years.
The following vacancies currently exist in the Banking and Financial Systems Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of DMS.
Vacancy: Customer Engineer
s (Male)
Applicants should be under 26 years of age and have a degree in Electronics or Mechatronics Engineering.
Selected candidates will be responsible for maintaining a variety of Hardware and Software installed at banks and commercial establishments, including Entrust Datacard Credit and Debit Card Personalization systems, Diebold Nixdorf self-checkout systems, and Panini cheque scanners.
Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a defined career growth path to Management.
Candidates living in the Greater Colombo area are preferred.
Benefits:
Attractive remuneration package based on qualifications and experience.
Medical insurance upon confirmation.
